---
title: "exercise 03 microsimulation"
---

## Objective

Add the exercise objective here.

## Instructions

1. Open the relevant R script.
2. Run the starter code.
3. Complete the missing sections.
4. Interpret the results.

## Starter code

```{r}
#| eval: false
# Add starter code here
```

## Questions

1. What are the main assumptions?
2. Which inputs have the greatest impact on results?
3. How would you explain the results to a decision maker?
